synthesis.summary: BrazilBet partner reported spoofed phishing emails using real player names/emails, asked FT to check for a breach. FT treated as P1 security, made channel private within minutes, ran a live investigation (WAF/edge, DB/ClickHouse, CRM audit, SendGrid) and found no IOCs on FT's side. Partner updated 3x via Intercom; incident.io update posted before moving to Monitoring.

14 Jul 11:19 UTC channel made private

D15: idle since 13:54 UTC 14 Jul, auto-nudge unanswered

synthesis.summary: Partner (Rhino) raised a P1 believing FT/SOC had agreed to actively monitor a Pragmatic platform release; FT determined internally within hours no such commitment existed. Engineers ran repeated ClickHouse checks, caught and corrected a premature partner claim that sync was 'all completed', and confirmed no platform issue by end of day.

synthesis.summary: Cloudflare-origin security check (SEC1-216) blocked legitimate shortlink/unsubscribe traffic for multiple brands on 2 Jul; mitigated within ~2h, root-cause fix merged same evening. incident.io status lagged the real fix by days. Partner (Estelarbet/PLIN, Gloria Morocho) has been waiting 12+ days for a promised RCA report, with two broken 'update tomorrow' promises.

synthesis.summary: Betpipo partner reported repeated logouts from 26 Jun; two earlier fixes (IP-mismatch session invalidation theory, AUTH_IP_BINDING disable) failed to hold and the issue kept recurring. Deep DB investigation 10-13 Jul found the real root cause: a shared UserTokens table where a player's re-auth can invalidate a CRM admin session on UserId collision. 4 fix PRs approved but not yet deployed.
key_events: 01 Jul: escalated to P1, first fix (disable AUTH_IP_BINDING) declared to stabilize, closed same day
03 Jul: partner formally complains, reopened
06 Jul: still recurring, reopened again, status stuck 'Investigating' since
10-13 Jul: real root cause found (UserTokens collision), 4 PRs opened/approved, not yet merged/deployed

promises: multiple 'stabilized' claims (01, 03, 06 Jul) all contradicted by recurrence

proposals: disable AUTH_IP_BINDING - insufficient, issue recurred
scope token invalidation to IsAdminToken (4 PRs) - approved in review, not yet deployed as of 14 Jul
open_breaches: C10: partner question from 10 Jul unanswered 5+ days
A2/A3: 'stabilized' framing repeatedly contradicted by recurrence
D15: status stuck 'Investigating' since 06 Jul despite active work through 14 Jul

synthesis.summary: H2Bet duplicate bonus grants (BetConstruct 503-after-commit causing retries) confirmed root cause quickly, but 50 days later still ~300 duplicate grants/week with no fix deployed. BetConstruct account-manager gap means zero external traction since 5 Jun. Rewards team only picked this up via Linear ticket (REW-176) on 9 Jul and immediately said no capacity until mid-Aug. Intercom ticket closed twice (26 May, 6 Jul by Andrea Azzopardi personally) implying progress with no fix shipped and no ETA ever given to partner.
key_events: 26 May: root cause ID'd same day, workaround rejected by partner 28 May
05 Jun: BetConstruct outreach dead-ends, no account manager
11 Jun: confirmed ~300/week duplicates still occurring
06 Jul: Rewards team says no capacity until mid-Aug; Andrea Azzopardi closes Intercom ticket
09 Jul: REW-176 created Urgent, blocked by capacity

promises: temp solution being arranged - not delivered, blocked until mid-Aug
no ETA ever committed for root fix

PR #123 observability only - merged, no fix
REW-176 interim workaround - Urgent, blocked until mid-Aug

A3: minimizing language ('doesn't seem urgent') contradicts confirmed weekly leakage
B5: BetConstruct escalation zero traction, proposed leadership escalation not actioned

synthesis.summary: Fleet-wide RDS Performance Schema memory leak, root-caused with rigor and fixed via PR #416 (merged 1 Jul), rolled out fleet-wide with staged reboots by 9 Jul. Solid engineering, but incident.io record silent 14 days (01-14 Jul) and two follow-ups (activity-manager resilience, RAM/swap alerting) remain unassigned as closure approaches.

synthesis.summary: GiG (Power Play's upstream KYC) event-ordering bug leaves stale block tags, blocking new-player journeys. Root cause found same day, multiple re-syncs done, but incident.io was closed 6 Jul against the partner's explicit request to keep it open, forcing a reopen 10 Jul when a related recurrence (119/ONT origin) surfaced. Permanent fix (order by GiG's update_epoch field) recommended twice, no incident.io follow-up created.
key_events: 18 Jun: root cause validated same day, 722 users affected
26-30 Jun: re-syncs, GiG partial fix
06 Jul: closed against partner's explicit stay-open request
10 Jul: partner reopens with new ONT/119 issue
13 Jul: still ~8 new stuck accounts/week, update_epoch fix proposed again

synthesis.summary: Segurobet Consent Manager queue stalled since 27 Jun due to partner's (BetConstruct/Betco) Operator API 500s. FT notified partner within 9 min and chased repeatedly, but partner has never given a fix/ETA (admitted 9 Jul they're 'at a loss'). This is the 3rd segurobet/BetConstruct API-reliability incident in ~5 weeks, never escalated to account management. Partner chase stopped after 10 Jul; alert auto-resolved 14/15 Jul with no human verification.

synthesis.summary: 223+ Tuohi/Noppa players missed welcome offers due to a lifecycle-entry race condition. Partner told FT internally 8 Jul they were 'proceeding with their termination' over this — never reflected in incident.io. Fix (Kafka switch, 13 Jul) was explicitly 'step 1' only; new instances of the same defect recurred 14 Jul (see also INC-13893, likely the same underlying bug recurring on Tuohi).

synthesis.summary: IP-whitelisting change introduced ~6 Apr silently blocked unsubscribe requests for Betiro, Rivalo, Leonbets since 7 Apr - undetected for ~3 months until an unrelated Intercom incident led someone to check. Technical fix merged same day (13 Jul), but no legal/compliance escalation, incomplete impact quantification (Betiro has none 2 days in), and minimizing language used internally. An environment sweep also flagged 3 more brands (Rocketship, Fairspin, Frank Casino) with the same broken config pattern, unresolved in the read window.

synthesis.summary: Incorrect game mappings caused a player's bets to match the wrong game (0% challenge progress). Investigation found scope escalated from 'one player' to brand-wide (113-114 of 114 Campeon origins, ~67.5k mapping rows) plus a confirmed crm-api resolver bug also hitting gembet/wsm-casino. Two systemic fix PRs (#2509, #2510) opened same day, but incident.io hasn't been updated since creation - still reads as a minor single-player issue.
key_events: 13 Jul: incident created (one player), root-cause investigation same evening finds brand-wide scope
14 Jul: crm-api resolver bug confirmed, PRs #2509/#2510 opened, ready for review but not merged; stuck player's challenge expiry flagged as time-sensitive

Zero incident.io updates posted since creation.
